data.content: Commit 29835df: Added logBeatState to InteractionLog interface with kind:beat_state JSONL entries. Terminal-manager now logs beat state before/after each prompt in the take-loop with iteration ID. Three call sites: before initial prompt (iteration 1), before spawnTakeChild prompt, and after each child close. Two new tests in interaction-logger.test.ts, full lifecycle test updated to include beat_state entries. All quality gates green (1642 tests pass, lint/typecheck/build clean).
